items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Mmm... Yummy, yummy!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hello? Are you with me? {PlayerName}, you seem a bit distracted.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: With so much delicious food right in front of you, aren't you gonna try any? Well if you're not interested, I'll gobble it all up!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: You've been absent-minded the whole day. Still bothered by that dream from last night?

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Wait, so you had a dream about the Sentinel? Like the one from your flashback when we saw the Sentinel statue after you lost your memory?

options.text: This time, I saw more.
This time, I saw something different.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hang on, let me get this straight... The Sentinel swooshed you off to a mountain shaped like a dragon...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: And then there were all these bad things going on with lots and lots of Tacet Discords, but the Sentinel saved the day!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: How exactly did it protect everyone again... Oh, in your dream it made the time different there?

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Yeah... The time in the mountains seemed to have slowed down from the outside, away from the Tacet Discords.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: The Sentinel must have created a barrier by manipulating the flow of time, keeping those monsters out.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: It was a safe haven from all the disturbances caused by the Tacet Discords, where people lived peacefully...

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Also... In my dream, I wasn't affected by the slowed time and could freely move in and out of the barrier.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: It's no shock that you have awesome powers, being friends with me.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hmm... What was that place you dreamed about called?

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: I'm not entirely sure I heard it correctly, but in my dream, the Sentinel mentioned a place called Mt. Firmament.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Mt. Firmament? Never heard of it...

items.speaker: Jiusi
items.text: You never heard of Mt. Firmament? Then I'm sure you're not from around here.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hold on! Did you just say Mt. Firmament?!

items.speaker: Jiusi
items.text: Oh my! Did that Echo just... talk?

options.text: It's a good friend of mine.
Relax. It won't hurt you.

items.speaker: Qingxiang
items.text: Come on, man, relax. You don't hear an Echo talking every day, but it's not that uncommon either!

items.speaker: Qingxiang
items.text: I heard there's a country called Ri... Rinas... What? Anyway, the Echoes there are next level.

options.text: What's up with this Mt. Firmament?

items.speaker: Qingxiang
items.text: Oh, you're not from around here? Well, that explains why you don't know about Mt. Firmament.

items.speaker: Qingxiang
items.text: Legends say Mt. Firmament is where the first people of Jinzhou lived. it looks like a giant statue of our Sentinel Jué.

items.speaker: Qingxiang
items.text: I've never actually heard of anyone going to that place. They say those who try either get lost in the sea mist or never come back.

items.speaker: Qingxiang
items.text: If you're curious, just head southeast. Mt. Firmament is on the east side of Whining Aix's Mire, and you can see it from a distance.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: The southeast...

options.text: What's your take? Any idea?

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: The past few days, especially this morning, I caught this unique smell from the southeast. From that mountain they just mentioned.

options.text: A unique smell... What do you mean?

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: It's like a strong energy pulsing through the air, but I can't quite put my finger on it. It feels kind of weird though, doesn't smell natural...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Could it have anything to do with what you said? A place where time passes slowly?

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hmm... Do you wanna go check it out?

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: I had a flashback about seeing their Sentinel... Perhaps that happened on Mt. Firmament...

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: I can feel an unknown force guiding me, urging me to go there and find something...

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Jinhsi said she'll go search for the Sentinel and update me on its whereabouts.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: But so far, I have not heard anything from the City Hall yet...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Then... Shall we go check it out together? It feels really suspicious.

options.text: Let's go ask Jinhsi about it.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Greetings, {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: What can I help you with today?

options.text: I'm here for Jinhsi. I have questions about the Sentinel.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: I regret to inform you that Madam Magistrate is not in the City Hall. She has left for Mt. Firmament.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: In fact... We have not heard back from her for days.

options.text: So you don't know what she is up to?

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Unfortunately, no. Please keep this confidential. The situation in Jinzhou is still unstable after our battle with the Threnodian. We must limit discussion of the Magistrate's whereabouts to a select few.

options.text: What's going on?

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: When we captured Scar, he claimed that the Fractsidus has imprisoned our Sentinel.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: It was around the same time that Madam Magistrate lost track of Sentinel Jué.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: If our Sentinel is truly in danger… Or if someone with malicious intent obtains this information, the potential consequences could be as catastrophic as the previous Threnodian invasion.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: In order to investigate the Sentinel's whereabouts, Madam Magistrate has left for Mt. Firmament, its last recorded location.

options.text: Did Jinhsi bring anyone with her? Bodyguards? Can you get in touch with them?

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Madam Magistrate traveled to Mt. Firmament alone.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: The looming threat of the Threnodian discouraged any additional divertion of human resources. Furthermore, when it comes to the Sentinel, force is not a viable solution.

options.text: I need to go to Mt. Firmament to meet with the Sentinel.
Jinhsi might be in trouble, and I want to help.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Madam Magistrate trusts you. It is beyond my authorization to meddle in your decisions.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: However, the landscape around Mt. Firmament is complex. One must be accompanied by a special "Wayfinder" to navigate safely. That's all I know.

options.text: Where can I find this Wayfinder, then?

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Currently, she's likely at the ferry terminal in Whining Aix's Mire. I'll reach out to her.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: To learn more about Mt. Firmament, you can meet her at the ferry. I lack the same level of understanding of the situation there as she does.

options.text: All right.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: I trust Madam Magistrate's decisions. I will do my utmost to handle the public matters on her behalf while she is away.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: I just... This worry about her safety won't leave me.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: In her last video message, I could tell she seemed weaker than usual, despite her efforts to maintain composure.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: Madam Magistrate's situation might not be optimistic...

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: {PlayerName}, Mt. Firmament is a dangerous place. Please take care.

items.speaker: Sanhua
items.text: I have sent the coordinates to your Terminal. Thank you for your kind help. I pray you will both return safely.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: I'm here.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: I'm listening!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hey, did you notice how the mountain has a strangely pleasant smell? It doesn't look edible though...

options.text: Are you hungry again?
I'm suddenly unsure whether I can count on you.
Go get some rest. I can handle it.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Not that I'm hungry or anything. I just tend to doze off easily. Feels like my body can only process what I consume while sleeping.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Well of course I'm reliable! Even if I do happen to fall asleep and can't hear you...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Of course you can! When I'm already so cool, you must be pretty amazing too!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: And don't worry, if there's any danger coming your way, I'll wake up like clockwork, just like last time.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Well, unless there's nothing that can even remotely challenge you.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: In that case, I probably won't... wake... up...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Mmm... Yummy, yummy!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hello? Are you with me? {PlayerName}, you seem a bit distracted.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: With so much delicious food right in front of you, aren't you gonna try any? Well if you're not interested, I'll gobble it all up!
